params.name: Locarno Treaties
params.description:
On Jun 16, 1925 AD, marks the official signing of the Locarno Treaty by multiple European countries.
After World War I, Germany became increasingly powerful with the aid of the Dawes Plan and began to seek to restore its great power status, while other European countries hoped to maintain a stable situation. Therefore, with the support of the United States, seven European countries held the Locarno Conference and formulated the treaty, which eased Europe's security concerns, improved relation …
